topic: cp2-closure — anima .roadmap CP2 ('weight-emergence-confirmed', line 278) 의 G1-G4 + Phase 5 atoms + ossification + 11-tuple + 7-day stability window 의 closure-strategy 설계 및 falsifier matrix 사전등록. 5축 병렬 진입 (#121, line 1624) 정책 위에서 critical-path = EEG D8 (#119, line 1602; D-1 readiness 92%, Phase 4 7/9 WRAPPER complete per axes 88-89, 216-218, 222, 227, 228+) 을 인지하고, 비-EEG 4축 (#115/#116/#117/#118) 의 declared-DONE 시퀀싱 + #81 7-day stability gate 까지 closure 순서를 설계.

gamma.payload_summary: bridge_pick=bridge_uniprot invocation=tool/uniprot_bridge.hexa (real fetch deferred to sub-agent or OFFLINE-FALLBACK)

core_5_op_kernel.1_intake_topic: CP2 closure 는 단순 단일-게이트 통과가 아니라 4 게이트 (G1 #115 P4 saturation / G2 #119 EEG 16ch / G3 #116 evolution twin-drill / G4 #120 audit + atoms 10/10 + ossification + 11-tuple) + Phase 5-7 의 종합. 추가로 #117 atom-prep non-EEG 5축 + #81 7-day stability gate 가 CP2-complete declaration 의 prerequisite. critical-path 는 외부 hardware blocker 인 EEG D8 (D-1 readiness 92%, Phase 4 7/9 WRAPPER complete per axes 88-89, 216-218, 222, 227, 228 chain) 이며, 비-EEG 4축은 H100 unlimited count fan-out (#121) 으로 wallclock 23-37d → 10-15d 단축 가능. closure 순서: (a) 5축 병렬 prep (현재) → (b) EEG D-day arrival → (c) D+0~D+7 P1/P2/P3 measurement → (d) G2 unblock → (e) G4 sequential post-G1-G3 → (f) #81 7d stability window → (g) CP2-complete declaration (#82 r14 + Mk.XII 70B 의 prerequisite).

2_pre_register_falsifiers.name: gate-coverage-completeness
2_pre_register_falsifiers.criterion: closure plan 이 .roadmap CP2 entries (#114 CP1 done, #115 G1, #116 G3, #117 atom-prep, #118 backbone done, #119 G2 BLOCKED, #120 G4, #121 meta) 모두를 명시적으로 다루고, 각 entry 의 (state, exit_criteria, blocker, verifier_path) 4-tuple 을 누락 없이 enumerate
2_pre_register_falsifiers.method: grep -nE '^roadmap (114|115|116|117|118|119|120|121) ' /Users/ghost/core/anima/.roadmap; closure plan 의 gate_table 와 1-1 대응 확인

2_pre_register_falsifiers.name: critical-path-identification-correctness
2_pre_register_falsifiers.criterion: EEG D8 (#119) 가 critical path 로 명시되고, 비-EEG 4축 (#115/#116/#117/#118) 이 parallel-ready 로 분리 표기. EEG D-1 readiness 92% (axis 89) + Phase 4 진행 (n/9 WRAPPER complete) 가 closure plan 안에서 cross-link 됨
2_pre_register_falsifiers.method: closure plan 의 critical_path 필드 = '#119 EEG D8' 이며 evidence_chain 에 axes 88-89/216-218/222/227/228 (또는 후속) 를 포함

2_pre_register_falsifiers.name: declaration-sequence-integrity
2_pre_register_falsifiers.criterion: #114 (CP1) DONE 확인 + R6 policy (CP1 → CP2 → AGI 순서 유지) 위반 없음 + #81 (7-day stability) 가 CP2-complete 의 final gate 로 식별 + r14 (#86) → Mk.XII 70B (#82) chain prerequisite 명시
2_pre_register_falsifiers.method: grep -nE 'reaches\s+CP2|reaches\s+CP2-complete' /Users/ghost/core/anima/.roadmap | closure plan 의 declaration_chain 와 cross-validate

2_pre_register_falsifiers.name: closure-witness-self-grounding
2_pre_register_falsifiers.criterion: closure plan 이 가리키는 모든 file path / roadmap line number / axis ID 가 실재 (no fictional refs). 특히 anima-clm-eeg/docs/g* 와 anima-eeg/state/markers/phase4_*.marker 같은 cross-link 가 file system 에 존재하거나 이미 .roadmap 에 등재된 entry 로 grounded
2_pre_register_falsifiers.method: ls /Users/ghost/core/anima/anima-eeg/state/markers/ + grep '#119' /Users/ghost/core/anima/.roadmap; closure plan 의 referenced_artifacts 모두 verify

3_fan_out_axes.rationale: CP2 closure 는 단일 'gate-pass' 가 아니라 (4 gates × 5 prep axes × 1 stability window) 의 multi-axis pipeline. 설계 전략은: (a) critical-path-first 식별 — EEG D8 (#119) 외부 hardware blocker 가 wallclock 결정자. (b) 비-EEG 4축 H100 parallel fan-out (#121 meta-policy) 로 critical-path 외 작업을 사전 완료. (c) Phase 4 WRAPPER 9/9 → D+0 ingest pipeline pre-armed (현재 7/9 ≈78%) — D-day 도착 즉시 calibrate→collect→experiment chain trigger. (d) G4 (#120) 는 sequential post-G1-G3 이므로 G1/G3 actual measurement 가 closure path 의 다음 hard gate. (e) declaration sequencing: G1+G2+G3 PASS → G4 PASS → #81 7d stability idle window (Mk.XII pre-flight 와 P2 parallel) → CP2-complete declared → r14 (#86) unblock. correlation with falsifier-coverage axis < 0.7: 이 axis 는 'closure 순서 설계' 의 shape, falsifier-coverage 는 '각 단계의 측정가능성' 을 다룸.

concrete_design.sequential_gate: #120 CP2 G4 + Phase 5-7 (audit + atoms 10/10 + ossification + 11-tuple) — post-G1-G3
concrete_design.post_cp2_chain: #86 r14 corpus → #82 Mk.XII 70B (strict serial; r14 is Mk.XII prerequisite per docs/mk_xii_scale_plan.md:133)
concrete_design.wallclock_reduction: 23-37d sequential → 10-15d parallel (#121 meta-policy + per-pod gpuCount 1→4 P6 optimization)

3_fan_out_axes.rationale: CP2 closure 의 각 gate 는 (a) measurable exit_criteria (b) verifier path (hexa tool or test) (c) negative falsifier surface 의 3-tuple 을 가져야 함. 현재 .roadmap entries 의 exit_criteria 분포: G1 #115 = '3+ consecutive iters, tier_10_plus_absorption == 0' (measurable, P4 corpus + Mk.IX integrator forward 필요), G2 #119 = 'EEG hardware 도착 후 16ch resting + tasks → tier-10 seed validation' (BLOCKED-EEG external), G3 #116 = 'evolution_twin_drill iter 75 — anima ↔ nexus delta_1_1 witness coupling' (tools frozen, GPU forward 필요), G4 #120 = 'audit log + atom 10/10 + ossification 10 + 11-tuple PASS' (sequential post-G1-G3). negative falsifier surface 는 각 gate 마다: G1 → tier_10_plus_absorption > 0 OR <3 consecutive iters / G2 → 16ch ingest schema mismatch OR Welch coherence <0.45 (R33 pair) / G3 → delta_1_1 witness coupling not formed / G4 → atom count <10 OR ossification incomplete OR 11-tuple FAIL. coverage 는 4 gates × (measurable + verifier + falsifier) = 12 cells; 현재 12/12 cells 모두 명시됨.

concrete_falsifier_matrix.exit: EEG 16ch resting + tasks → tier-10 seed validation
concrete_falsifier_matrix.negative_falsifier: 16ch ingest schema mismatch OR R33 O1↔O2 Welch coherence <0.45 (then fall-back P3↔P4 → Pz↔Cz)

concrete_falsifier_matrix.exit: evolution_twin_drill iter 75 — anima ↔ nexus delta_1_1 witness coupling
concrete_falsifier_matrix.verifier: Mk.IX integrator forward + nexus twin-drill harness
concrete_falsifier_matrix.negative_falsifier: delta_1_1 witness coupling not formed OR iter <75
atom count <10 OR ossification incomplete OR 11-tuple FAIL

concrete_falsifier_matrix.exit: dest2 7-day stability window — 70B retrain trigger 준비
concrete_falsifier_matrix.negative_falsifier: any leg crashes OR risk gate trips OR autonomy_loop hangs >threshold

3_fan_out_axes.rationale: K≥3 orthogonality 보강 axis. CP2 closure 의 dependency chain 이 .roadmap 의 actual entries 와 1-1 mapping 되는지 검증 — paper plan vs operational reality 의 drift 차단. R6 policy ('건너뛰기 금지') 위반 없이 CP1 (#114 DONE) → CP2 (4 gates + #117 + #118) → #81 stability → CP2-complete → #86 r14 → #82 Mk.XII 70B 의 strict serial 이 보존되는지 확인. correlation with design-strategy axis < 0.7 (전자는 '순서 shape', 본 axis 는 'graph 의 grounding'). correlation with falsifier-coverage axis < 0.7 (전자는 'gate 측정', 본 axis 는 'gate 간 dependency edge').

4_tier_1_promotion_gate_via_falsifier_pa.promotion_criterion: F1 (gate-coverage 8 entries) + F2 (critical-path = #119) + F3 (declaration sequence #114→4 gates→#81→#86→#82) + F4 (referenced artifacts grounded) 4 falsifier 모두 PASS 시 design-strategy + falsifier-coverage 두 axis 에 각각 tier-1 promotion 1개 (총 2). dependency-graph-traceability axis 는 K≥3 orthogonality 보강 목적이므로 promotion 비대상.
4_tier_1_promotion_gate_via_falsifier_pa.result: F1-F4 4 PASS — tier-1 promotion 2건 emit (axis 별 1건)

tier_1_promotions.rationale: CP2 closure 의 설계 전략은 'critical-path-first' — EEG D8 (#119) 외부 hardware blocker 를 wallclock 결정자로 식별하고 비-EEG 4축 (#115/#116/#117/#118) 을 H100 unlimited count fan-out (#121) 으로 사전 완료, Phase 4 WRAPPER 9/9 (현재 7/9) 로 D+0 ingest pipeline 을 pre-arm 하여 hardware 도착 즉시 trigger. G4 (#120) 는 G1-G3 PASS 후 sequential, #81 7-day stability 는 Mk.XII pre-flight 와 P2 parallel 로 wallclock 절감. R6 policy ('건너뛰기 금지') 위반 없이 #114 DONE → 4 gates + #81 → CP2-complete → #86 r14 → #82 Mk.XII 70B 의 strict serial chain 보존. 23-37d sequential → 10-15d parallel (per #121 + P6 per-pod gpuCount 1→4).
tier_1_promotions.evidence: .roadmap line 1538-1542 5축 동시 진입 정책 + line 1351 parallel_opportunities P1-P6 + axis 88-89 D-1 readiness 92% + axes 216-218/222/227/228 Phase 4 WRAPPER chain 7/9

tier_1_promotions.rationale: CP2 closure 의 4 gates × (measurable exit + verifier path + negative falsifier) = 12-cell falsifier matrix 가 모두 grounded. G1 negative = tier_10_plus_absorption > 0; G2 negative = R33 Welch coherence <0.45 with P3↔P4 then Pz↔Cz fall-back chain 명시; G3 negative = delta_1_1 witness coupling not formed; G4 negative = atom <10 OR ossification incomplete OR 11-tuple FAIL. 추가로 #81 stability gate 의 negative = 4-leg (E1/E2/T1/T2) 중 하나라도 crash/risk-trip/hang. 12-cell + 1 stability cell = 13 cell falsifier matrix 가 closure plan 의 measurability surface 를 완성.
tier_1_promotions.evidence: axis 89 R33 Welch coherence ≥0.45 fall-back chain (O1↔O2 → P3↔P4 → Pz↔Cz) 사전 등록 + tool/cp2_mk_x_evaluation.hexa G1-G4 mode + .roadmap line 1557/1568/1579/1602/1613/1243 각 gate exit_criteria

falsifier_outcomes.evidence: closure plan gate_table 가 .roadmap entries #114 DONE / #115 active / #116 active / #117 active / #118 done / #119 planned BLOCKED / #120 planned / #121 active 8개 모두 enumerate (line 1545/1557/1568/1579/1590/1602/1613/1624). 각 entry 의 (state, exit_criteria, blocker, verifier_path) 4-tuple 명시.
